infoModal.title: About Pokemon TCG Pocket Deck Tier List

whatIsThis.title: What is this website?
whatIsThis.description: This website shows the current best decks for the Pokemon TCG Pocket game based on tournament performance data from <0>Limitless Tournaments</0>. The tier list is updated regularly to reflect the latest meta.

deckLists.title: View Deck Lists
deckLists.description: Click on any deck in the tier list to view its complete card list.

missingCards.title: Missing Cards Feature
missingCards.description: When viewing a deck list, you can click on cards you don't have. The website will then show you the next best deck that you can make without those cards.

dynamicTierList.title: Dynamic Tier List
dynamicTierList.description: As you mark cards as missing, the tier list will update to reflect the new ratings based on the cards you have available.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.intro: This project uses two main data sources:

sources.tournament: Tournament data from <0>Limitless Tournaments</0>, a leading platform for Pokemon TCG tournaments.
sources.cards: Card data from <0>pokemon-tcg-pocket-cards</0>, an open-source repository that provides comprehensive card information.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: This website is open source. You can find the source code on <0>GitHub</0>. Contributions are welcome!

deckPage.deckFinderHeader: Click on cards you don't have. The deck will update to show the best with your available cards.

bestDeckFinder.title: Find Your Best Deck
bestDeckFinder.description1: Discover the strongest deck you can build with your collection. The Best Deck Finder starts by showing you the top deck in the game, but you can click any cards you don't have. It will then show you the next best deck that doesn't use those cards.
bestDeckFinder.description2: Keep removing cards until you find a deck where you have everything. The relative strength indicator shows you how powerful your deck is compared to the best deck in the game.

hero.title: Pokemon TCG Pocket Best Decks and Tier List
hero.subtitle: Stay ahead of the Pokemon TCG Pocket meta with a data driven deck tier list. Built from tournament results, find full lists, mark the cards you're missing, and uncover the strongest builds you can craft right now.

tournamentResults.title: Tournament Results
tournamentResults.description: The tier list is based on tournament results, with an algorithm to determine the tier and decklist

weeklyUpdates.title: Weekly Updates
weeklyUpdates.description: The tier list is updated weekly, with new decks and matchups added every Monday

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter decks by Energy or no Ex cards, useful for helping beat some of those Solo Battles

missingCards.title: Missing Cards
missingCards.description: Click on any cards that you are missing, and the tier list will update automatically for what you have

matchups.title: Matchups
matchups.description: See matchup data for which decks are strong against others, and their winrates

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: This website is open source, you can find the source code on <0>GitHub</0>
